sample_source: tRNA variants with the potential to mistranslate are found at numerous different loci in the human population.
cell_line: For example, tRNASerUGG,G26A reduces the growth of the wild-type BY4742 strain...
strain: Y7092 (MATα can1Δ::STE2pr-SpHIS5 lyp1Δ his3Δ1 leu2Δ0 ura3Δ0 met15Δ0) strains are derivatives of S288c.
